items.title: Photo Schema V2
items.notes: Introduce per-photo status, photo_id, redaction workflow, and private folder. Updates span data-standards.md, flush logic, crawler, and templates.

items.title: Documentation Sprint
items.notes: Three sessions to document schema, architecture, and scripts before the collection grows further.

items.title: Photo Intake Fix List
items.notes: Four high-priority fixes blocking clean processing of the next photo batch. Must be resolved before any new intake runs.

items.title: Update data-standards.md — photo schema v2
items.notes: Add status (per-photo, draft|published|redacted), photo_id (MDM-PHO0001 format), redaction_reason (required when status=redacted), photographer field. Add private/ to subfolder list. Update Cross-Reference Field Summary table to show status on Photos. Clarify redacted meaning for photos vs documents in Status Vocabulary section.

items.title: Migration script — backfill photo_id on all existing index.md entries
items.notes: Walk site/soldiers/[slug]/photos/[subfolder]/index.md. For each photo entry missing photo_id, generate MDM-PHO0001 style ID scoped per soldier. Write back. Dry-run mode required. Confirm numbering starts at 0001 per soldier, not globally.

items.title: Migration script — backfill status: draft on all existing photo entries
items.notes: Walk all photo index.md files. For each photo entry missing status:, add status: draft. Safe default — nothing changes on the public site. Dry-run mode required.

items.title: Create soldiers/[slug]/photos/private/ folder structure
items.notes: Add private/ subfolder under each existing soldier's photos/ directory. Add .gitkeep so folders commit. Document that Worker must block */photos/private/* at the infrastructure level.

items.title: Worker rule — block */photos/private/* from public serving
items.notes: Add route guard in worker.js so any request matching the private/ path pattern returns 403. Test with a real file before marking complete.

items.title: Crawler guard — skip photo entries where file does not exist
items.notes: Before building gallery output, check that the physical file exists at the expected path. Skip silently if missing (covers redacted photos moved to private/). Log skipped entries for audit.

items.title: Crawler — filter status: draft and status: redacted from public gallery output
items.notes: Photos with status: draft or status: redacted must not appear in the built site. Crawler should only pass status: published entries to the gallery template.

items.title: Tab 4 flush — write photo_id and status: draft on every flushed photo entry
items.notes: When flush writes a photo entry to site/, auto-generate photo_id in correct format and set status: draft. Neither field should require manual entry during intake.

items.title: Tab 4 flush — expose status field in per-photo form
items.notes: Add status dropdown (draft / published / redacted) to per-photo form in staging pane. Default: draft. When redacted selected, show required redaction_reason text field.

items.title: Update data-standards.md — document redaction fields
items.notes: Add has_redactions: true/false and redaction_reason: to document front matter schema. Document the <redact>...</redact> tag convention for inline body redaction. Template must suppress <redact> content on render. has_redactions: true is set when any <redact> tag exists.

items.title: Template — suppress <redact> tag content in document renderer
items.notes: document.njk (and any other template rendering document body) must strip <redact>...</redact> blocks before output. Original text preserved in source file; never rendered publicly.

items.title: Session A — Schema completion: bring data-standards.md fully current
items.notes: Incorporate all schema changes since data-standards.md was last updated: photo v2 fields, document redaction fields, has_redactions, redact tag convention, private/ subfolder, status vocabulary clarification for photos. Every content type should have a complete and current front matter example after this session.

items.title: Session B — Architecture doc: create _docs/architecture.md
items.notes: Document how all pieces connect: crawler (reads photo index.md, produces gallery data), Worker (serves R2, blocks private/, proxies to Pages), Eleventy (templates, collections, build output), admin tool (what each tab writes, what files it touches). The document you would need if you stepped away for 6 months.

items.title: Session C — Script inventory and cleanup
items.notes: Go through every script in repo. For each: document what it does, what it reads, what it writes, and whether it is current or superseded. Known candidates for removal: upload-photos.sh (superseded by v2). Remove superseded scripts and stale generated files. Output: _docs/scripts.md listing all current scripts with descriptions.

items.title: Image preview not rendering in staging pane
items.notes: Add GET /api/photos/staging/:slug/image/:filename route to photos.js. Update phRenderPhoto() to use instead of label span. Blocking — currently tagging photos blind.

items.title: Contains / Tagged — freeform CSV only, no roster multi-select
items.notes: Replace CSV inputs with multi-select from roster list. Add freeform CSV fallback field for slugs not yet in system. Typo risk on every photo intake without this fix.

items.title: Photographer field missing from per-photo form
items.notes: Field exists in YAML schema (photographer: romani-val) but is not exposed in the Tab 4 staging form. Add as separate field from the Credit display string.

items.title: Subject slug override missing for Profile destination
items.notes: Flush routes to staging folder slug rather than subject. When photographer and subject differ, there is no way to specify the correct target soldier. Needs an override input on the per-photo form when destination is Profile.

items.title: Event slug showing [] literal in promote form
items.notes: populatePromoteForm reads event: [] as literal string instead of empty array. Fix parser in populatePromoteForm.

items.title: Photo form not using full content width
items.notes: Horizontal space issue — staging pane form is narrower than available content area. Desktop only, no mobile concern.

items.title: Fuzzy match scorer unreliable — needs Levenshtein or token-based implementation
items.notes: Current scorer got lucky with romani-val. Needs proper implementation before the next batch. Levenshtein or token-based.

items.title: Lightbox opens wrong photo when Gallery 1 and Gallery 2 both present
items.notes: loop.index0 resets to 0 for each gallery loop. Fix: build a single flat index map keyed to each photo's position in the full allPhotos array and use that instead of loop.index0.

items.title: Profile hero photo uses /soldiers/ path not R2 path
items.notes: Hero src hardcoded to repo path /soldiers/[slug]/... instead of R2 URL /media/photos/soldiers/... Phase 5 fix.

items.title: marvin-miller-selfie.jpeg filename mismatch in index.md
items.notes: File in R2 may be .jpeg; index.md may reference .jpg. Verify and reconcile.

items.title: Documents tab rendering issue (pre-Phase 4 known bug)
items.notes: Known issue predating Phase 4. Re-verify after Phase 5 template work.

items.title: Lightbox not firing for newly promoted photos
items.notes: Likely JS initialization timing — lightbox binds on page load, not on DOM mutation. Investigate after image serving route is fixed.

items.title: Admin tool Commit button unreliable
items.notes: After clicking Commit in the UI, always verify in GitHub Desktop History tab that a new commit appears. Root cause not yet identified.

items.title: UTF-8 em dash mangled in promoted document title
items.notes: — appearing in YAML title field after promote. Fix: explicit UTF-8 encoding in fsp.writeFile call in add-record.js.

items.title: csvToArray defined twice in index.html
items.notes: Once inside AR IIFE, once outside for MSM modal. Harmless but messy. Consolidate when convenient.

items.title: Unit document Author Slug UI gives no signal about routing to documents/unit/
items.notes: When Author Slug is cleared, document routes to documents/unit/ but there is no UI affordance indicating this. Add helper text or visual signal.

items.title: No Cancel button on promote panel in Tab 3
items.notes: No way to back out of promote flow without promoting. Add Cancel button to return to triage view without writing any files.

items.title: Create stub — bacon-wg
items.notes: Slug: bacon-wg. Name: W.G. Bacon. Rank: LTC. Status: deceased. Needed so author byline resolves on promoted Bacon deposition document.

items.title: Create stubs — caruthers-tom, kinsey-charles, ryneska-john
items.notes: Referenced in Bacon document contains field. No profiles exist yet.

items.title: Create stubs — kahnke-steve, louisell, bacon-wg (Neal account references)
items.notes: Referenced in Neal account. No profiles exist. bacon-wg overlaps with DATA-TASK-20260518000035 — create once.

items.title: Reconcile martin-michael vs martin-mike slug conflict
items.notes: Two potential slugs for the same soldier. Confirm correct slug before scaffolding profile.

items.title: Confirm blais-dizzy given name and update slug
items.notes: Currently nickname slug only. Do not finalize profile until given name confirmed.

items.title: Do not scaffold blagg until first name found
items.notes: Last name only. Hold until first name confirmed.

items.title: Update bee-incident slug from bee-incident-1971 to bee-incident-1971-03-22
items.notes: Testing brief still lists old slug. Update testing brief and any references.

items.title: Dillon document — add contains cross-references for named soldiers
items.notes: Stub profiles for soldiers named in Dillon document not yet cross-referenced in contains field.

items.title: Confirm McGrew calendar document type — log or journal
items.notes: Decision deferred. Resolve before scaffolding McGrew document.

items.title: Remove miller-marvin-dale-OLD.md once new profile confirmed stable
items.notes: Old profile file still in repo as fallback. Remove after confirming new profile renders correctly in production.

items.title: Higher-resolution Cardwell clippings
items.notes: LaCunha deceased. Peggy may have originals. Follow up.

items.title: Linda Martin shadow box photograph
items.notes: Offered to Angelo State. Unclear if in collection. Follow up to confirm status.

items.title: Grenada MS war memorial — carries Sargent's name
items.notes: Note should appear on Sargent's profile once scaffolded.

items.title: Unnamed boot camp soldier in Linda Martin transcript — potentially identifiable
items.notes: Review transcript for identifying details. Do not scaffold until identification confirmed.

items.title: Cate shadow box photograph
items.notes: Michael Miller has a photograph of Larry Cate's shadow box. Needs to be added to the project. Coordinate with Michael Miller.

items.title: Honor Wall — tabled until Unit History page is built
items.notes: Revisit after Unit History page is complete.

items.title: ASA newsletter migration
items.notes: Skip until ready to do as a clean batch.

items.title: Served Alongside — add to Edit Record under Soldier type
items.notes: Wire to site/_data/relationships.json. Needs separate server endpoint since it targets relationships.json not front matter.

items.title: Edit Record — photo metadata editing (contains, tagged, all fields on existing photos)
items.notes: Deferred from Tab 4 scope. Belongs in Tab 2 Edit Record with special handling for nested photo array structure.

items.title: Edit Record — profile photo picker for soldier
items.notes: Select a soldier's profile photo from all photos where they appear in contains, not just their own folder. Pairs with photo metadata editing task.

items.title: Phase 5 — Remove photos: array fallback from soldier profile template
items.notes: Soldier profiles should pull photo data from crawler only. Remove photos: array fallback. Pairs with hero profile photo path fix.

items.title: Upload script --remote flag parsing bug
items.notes: Suspected bug where --remote flag does not pass through correctly. Verify with test upload before any bulk use. Direct wrangler commands work as fallback.

items.title: Add Col Bacon profile stub
items.notes: Timeline entry (manual?) to cover service as Stone Mtn 6 from Feb-July 1971.

items.title: Event data did not propagate to index.md
items.notes: Entered a new photo, the event was not written to the field, (shown as blank, see the following path): C:\Users\michael.miller\archive\d281staircav\site\events\contact-nui-ba-1971-10-21\index.md

items.title: Crawler does not index field/events/[slug]/ subdirectories
items.notes: photosBySlug.js KNOWN_SUBFOLDERS looks for a literal field/events/index.md. Event-destination photos are flushed to field/events/[eventSlug]/index.md (one level deeper) and are never picked up. Fix: replace static KNOWN_SUBFOLDERS entry for 'field/events' with a dynamic scan of all subdirectories under field/events/ and parse each one's index.md. Photos flushed with dest=event will then appear on the soldier's profile tab.

items.title: Event page has no photo pipeline — images: front matter only, no crawler lookup
items.notes: The event template reads images: from the event's own front matter. There is no byEvent reverse lookup in photosBySlug and no photosByEvent data file. Photos flushed with dest=event (stored under soldiers/[slug]/photos/field/events/[eventSlug]/) cannot surface on the event page until: (1) crawler builds a byEvent map keyed by event slug, (2) either a photosByEvent.js data file is created or the event template is wired to consume photosBySlug.byEvent. Pairs with SITE-BUG-20260518140001001.

items.title: Profile destination — Subject field always explicit, pre-populated with folder slug
items.notes: Replaced optional override input with a required Subject field that defaults to the staging folder slug. Removes ambiguity: every profile assignment names its target soldier explicitly. Label changed from "Subject Slug — override" to "Subject".

items.title: YAML caption/credit fields break on colons — missing quotes in flush output
items.notes: caption_short, credit, and photographer were written as bare YAML scalars. Any value containing a colon caused a YAMLException at build time. Fixed by adding yamlStr() helper in photos.js that wraps values in double quotes and escapes embedded backslashes and double quotes.

items.title: Profile flush writes staging folder slug to soldier: header instead of subject override
items.notes: processEntries() received targetSlug correctly but the index.md header always used the outer slug variable. Fixed: header now uses targetSlug || slug so cross-soldier profile flushes write the correct soldier: value.

items.title: Tab 4 — Subject field validates stub existence on blur; Create Stub modal; flush pre-check
items.notes: When Profile destination is selected and Subject field loses focus, calls GET /api/soldiers/check. If slug is missing, shows inline warning with Create Stub button. Modal collects name/rank/status and POSTs to /api/soldiers/create. Flush pre-checks all profile subject slugs and warns (non-blocking) if any are missing. Backend endpoints already existed in soldiers.js.
